task_completion.description: Verifies the agent logged into Redmine as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Redmine web interface should be visible with 'Logged in as admin' displayed, typically in the top right corner.

task_completion.description: Verifies the REST Web Service was enabled in Redmine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Redmine Administration -> Settings -> API tab, the 'Enable REST web service' checkbox should be checked and saved.

task_completion.description: Verifies the 'ci_runner' user was created with the correct name and email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Redmine Users list should show the user 'ci_runner' with the name 'CI Bot' and email 'ci_runner@example.com', or a success message indicating this user was created.

task_completion.description: Verifies the user is not required to change their password at next logon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: During user creation or editing, the 'Must change password at next logon' checkbox should be visibly unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent obtained the API access key for the 'ci_runner' account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The API access key for 'ci_runner' should be visible on screen (typically found in the 'My account' page after logging in as ci_runner, or generated via an API token view).

task_completion.description: Verifies the API key was saved to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor should show the API key being saved to or present in the file '/home/ga/ci_api_key.txt'.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the web browser to interact with Redmine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Redmine web interface to configure settings and create the user, rather than bypassing the UI with direct database or console commands.

integrity.description: Verifies the saved API key appears to be a genuine generated token.
integrity.visual_evidence: The API key saved to the text file should be a long alphanumeric string (typical of Redmine API tokens) and match the token shown in the Redmine UI, not a placeholder or hardcoded string.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually created the output file in the terminal or a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or text editor should show the actual creation and saving of '/home/ga/ci_api_key.txt', rather than just echoing the path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target user login: 'ci_runner'. Target user email: 'ci_runner@example.com'. Output file path: '/home/ga/ci_api_key.txt'.
